scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight leading-tight
scale.caption: text-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-muted-foreground

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-semibold transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary/10 hover:border-primary/30 bg-transparent text-primary h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent/10 text-foreground/80 hover:text-foreground h-10 px-4 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border border-border/50 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-border/50 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.base: h-12 bg-white border-border/80 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/10 rounded-lg px-4 transition-all

landing_page.hero: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center min-h-[80vh]
landing_page.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]

dashboard.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-border bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-xl hidden md:flex flex-col

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Implement the 'Dual Persona' theme. Use the defined 'primary' (Black/White) for structure, but use 'accent.blue' for Startup dashboards and 'accent.purple'/'accent.pink' for Creator dashboards to visually distinguish the roles.
2. TYPOGRAPHY: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately. Use 'Manrope' for all headings (h1-h3) and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body text. This is non-negotiable for the brand voice.
3. LAYOUT: For the Landing Page, use the 'Tetris' grid mode (asymmetric columns). Do NOT use standard 3-column grids. For Dashboards, use the 'Bento' grid (dense, gap-4/6).
4. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI for complex interactions (Select, Dialog, Form) but style them using the 'visual_enhancers' rules (rounded-xl, specific shadows). Do NOT use default Shadcn styling.
5. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do not use placeholders. The 'hero_bg' should be used with a low opacity overlay in the AI Matching section.
6. MATCHING ENGINE: Visually represent the 'AI Match' using the 'Tracing Beam' effect or a glowing border around the matched creator cards.
7. GLASSMORPHISM: Apply the 'glass' class to the sticky navigation bar and any floating modal/overlay.
8. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element (buttons, inputs, cards) has a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'login-btn', 'creator-card-1').
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' - no generic centered layouts or default blue gradients.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-8, p-12).
Dark colors must be solid or subtle noise, NO dark gradients.
Micro-animations on all hover states are mandatory.
Never use 'transparent' backgrounds for dropdowns or headers with content underneath.
